meta.title: Make your SDLC AI-native — in minutes · Fibe
meta.description: Develop locally, deploy live on Fibe with a single command, and give every teammate a Playground where AI agents build, verify, and ship. From a docker-compose to a live, AI-native workflow — in minutes, not months.
meta.keywords: Fibe, AI-native development, SDLC, docker compose, deploy, playgrounds, AI agents, CI/CD, live preview, developer platform
meta.og_title: Make your SDLC AI-native — in minutes
meta.og_description: Develop locally, deploy live with one command, and let AI agents build, verify, and ship on isolated Playgrounds. From docker-compose to a live, AI-native workflow.
meta.twitter_title: Make your SDLC AI-native — in minutes · Fibe
meta.twitter_description: From a local docker-compose to a live, AI-native workflow — develop, deploy, and delegate to agents on Fibe.

hero.title: Make your SDLC AI-native — in minutes.

video.label: Watch the full demo
video.aria: Product demo: transforming an SDLC into AI-native workflows with Fibe

flow.payoff: From a docker-compose to a live, AI-native workflow. Minutes, not months.

develop.title: Develop locally.
develop.lede: Bring your whole stack up and watch the app come to life — exactly as you work today.
develop.how: One command brings up the frontend, API, Kafka and a sample producer.
develop.get: The app live on localhost, hot-reloading on every save.

deploy.title: Deploy live in one command.
deploy.lede: What runs in Docker runs on Fibe — no rewrites, no new pipeline to learn.
deploy.how: Add a few labels to your compose file, then one deploy command.
deploy.get: A shareable live Playground, updated with every git push.

delegate.title: Delegate to AI agents.
delegate.lede: Describe a change in plain English; Fibe's agents do the rest.
delegate.how: Ask in the bridge — agents read the code and edit your Playground.
delegate.get: A reviewed pull request, verified on the live app.

contact.title: Ready to go AI-native?
contact.lede: Spin up your first Playground free. Bring a docker-compose; leave with a live, AI-native workflow.

footer.support: Support Ukraine. russia is a terrorist state.
